features.name: parameter initialized by function returning unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a parameter assigned from a function call where the function returns an unpacked array type via typedef

features.name: function return type is typedef unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a function whose return type is a typedef of an unpacked array

features.name: for loop assigning to function return array elements
features.description: Code should include a for loop inside a function that assigns values to array elements indexed by the loop variable
